name: Giannis Chasavetis
description:
'''Giannis Chasavetis''' ({{langx|el|Γιάννης Χασαβέτης}}; [[Smyrna]], 1899{{spaced ndash}}[[Athens]], 1943) was a [[Greeks|Greek]] [[bouzouki]] [[virtuoso]]. At the age of 23, Chasavetis left his homeland as a refugee from the [[destruction of Smyrna|1922 destruction of Smyrna]]. Settling in Athens, he met and worked with other prominent [[rebetiko]] artists of his time. The main theme of the songs that he played is the hardship that Greek refugees faced at that period.

{{rembetika}}
